name: medicine-image-extraction-root
description: Root package to run all services concurrently

scripts.start: concurrently -n "AI,NODE,VITE" -c "cyan,magenta,green" "npm run start:ai" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd node-backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../python-ai-service && pip install -r requirements.txt
